appDescription.message: An advanced extension to block unauthorized sites with full control over paths, schedules, and parental password protection.

openDashboard.description: Button text to open the options page.

blockedSorry.message: Sorry, this site is not currently allowed.
blockedSorry.description: Main heading on the blocked page.

blockedReasonDefault.message: Parental permission is required for access.
blockedReasonDefault.description: Default reason for a site being blocked.

blockedReasonSchedule.message: This site is blocked because it is outside of the allowed browsing times.
blockedReasonSchedule.description: Reason for blocking due to schedule.

blockedReasonLimit.message: This site is blocked because the daily time limit has been exceeded.
blockedReasonLimit.description: Reason for blocking due to daily limit.

blockedReasonEmergency.message: Emergency Lock is active. All sites are blocked.
blockedReasonEmergency.description: Reason for blocking due to emergency lock.

setupTitle.description: Title for the initial setup screen.

setupDescription.message: Please set a password to protect settings and manage websites.

loginDescription.message: Enter the password to open the control panel.

saveAndActivate.description: Button text for saving the initial password.

tempAllowSuccess.description: Alert message for temporary access. $MINUTES$ is a placeholder.

invalidMinutes.message: Please enter a valid number of minutes!

loginPasswordPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the main login password field.

tabWhitelist.description: Tab title for the whitelist section.

tabSchedule.description: Tab title for the schedule section.

tabLimits.description: Tab title for the limits section.

tabLog.description: Tab title for the activity log section.

tabSettings.description: Tab title for the settings section.

allowedWebsites.description: Header for the whitelist management section.

addSitePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the URL input field.

addButton.description: Button text to add a site to the whitelist.

allowedTime.description: Label for the time range selector.

timeSeparator.description: Separator between start and end time.

dailyLimit.description: Header for the daily limit section.

saveLimitButton.description: Button to save the daily limit.

enableDailyLimit.description: Label for the daily limit activation checkbox.

emergencyLock.description: Header for the emergency lock section.

enableLockButton.description: Button to enable the emergency lock.

disableLockButton.description: Button to disable the emergency lock.

failedAttempts.description: Header for the failed attempts log.

clearLogButton.description: Button to clear the activity log.

siteAlreadyWhitelisted.message: This site is already on the whitelist!

noSitesAdded.message: No sites added yet. All websites are currently blocked.

resetConfirm.message: Are you sure? This will delete all data.

settingsSaved.description: Success message when popup settings are saved.
